7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:H/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Incorrect escaping of a saved filter's owner allows an attacker to inject arbitrary HTML on systems where $g_show_user_realname = ON.

### Impact
Cross-site scripting (XSS).

Note that By default, only users with *Manager* access level or above can save their filters publicly

### Patches
- 44f490bcf20fd491c1b8f3fc9dd041d8c2a30010

### Workarounds
- Prevent display of users' real name (set `$g_ show_user_realname = OFF;` in configuration)
- Restrict ability to store filters (set $`g_stored_query_create_threshold` / $`g_stored_query_create_shared_threshold` to `NOBODY` 

### Credits
Thanks to siunam (Tang Cheuk Hei) for discovering and responsibly reporting the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00419, "percentile": 0.33537}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:35:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40607"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-22T20:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:35:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/security/advisories/GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh", "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt/commit/44f490bcf20fd491c1b8f3fc9dd041d8c2a30010", "https://mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=37015", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40607", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mantisbt/mantisbt/security-advisories/GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mantisbt/mantisbt", "summary": "MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Saved-Filter Owner Column", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:20:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-f633-865q-2mhh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.28.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "mantisbt/mantisbt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.1.0, <= 2.28.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MantisBT is Vulnerable to Stored XSS in Saved-Filter Owner Column
